name: io.github.pytheum/pytheum
title: pytheum
description: Read-only access to the verified prediction-market graph: settlement-verified Kalshi<->Polymarket equivalence pairs, live orderbooks, point-in-time price history, news/social/macro context, and Polymarket trader analytics. 27 tools, all read-only.

com.pytheum.note: Reference template for MCP Registry publication. The remote (streamable-http) entry is listable today. The pypi stdio entry requires a `pytheum-mcp` console_scripts entrypoint bound to pytheum.mcp.server:main (stdio) — see docs/mcp/compliance.md. Alternative namespace `com.pytheum/pytheum` via DNS verification on pytheum.com.
